questions.question: How is the async cloud coding agent triggered in production?
options: A long-lived SSH session into a VM
A GitHub webhook fired by an issue label or PR comment, dispatched to a sandbox worker
A scheduled cron job hitting the repo
A manual file upload
questions.question_zh: 异步云端 coding agent 在生产中如何被触发?
options_zh: 向虚拟机长开 SSH 会话
由 issue label 或 PR comment 触发的 GitHub webhook,派发给 sandbox worker
对仓库的定时 cron 任务
手工上传文件

questions.question: Why must the agent run with a short-lived GitHub App installation token rather than a personal access token?
options: Apps avoid GitHub rate limits entirely
App tokens grant fine-grained, scoped, short-lived credentials suited for per-task workers
Personal access tokens cannot open PRs
Apps require less code than PATs
questions.question_zh: 为什么 agent 必须使用短生命周期的 GitHub App installation token,而不是 personal access token?
options_zh: App 完全规避 GitHub 速率限制
App token 提供细粒度、按 scope、短生命周期的凭证,适合按任务分配的 worker
Personal access token 不能开 PR
App 比 PAT 需要更少的代码

questions.question: Which two protections prevent the agent from clobbering main?
options: Requiring a captcha per push
Branch protection enforcing no direct push or force-push to main, with the app not on the bypass list
Encrypting the repo before clone
Disabling git on the worker
questions.question_zh: 哪两种保护防止 agent 破坏 main 分支?
options_zh: 每次 push 都要求 captcha
分支保护禁止直接 push 或 force-push 到 main,且 app 不在豁免名单
克隆前对仓库加密
在 worker 上禁用 git

questions.question: Why is path-scoped protection for .github/workflows enforced at the worker rather than as a GitHub App permission?
options: Workflows are stored outside the repo
Path scoping is impossible in any form
GitHub App permissions are not path-scoped, so the worker's allow-list check on the proposed diff is the right place to enforce it
.github/workflows is a virtual path
questions.question_zh: 为什么针对 .github/workflows 的路径作用域保护在 worker 上,而不是作为 GitHub App 权限来执行?
options_zh: workflow 存放在仓库之外
任何形式的路径作用域都不可能
GitHub App 权限不支持路径作用域,因此 worker 在提议 diff 上的 allow-list 检查才是合适的执行点
.github/workflows 是一个虚拟路径

questions.question: What gating happens after the agent loop concludes, before opening a PR?
options: The reviewer model rewrites the diff
Full CI runs in the sandbox; coverage delta is computed; PRs with a regression beyond a threshold are labeled needs-review
The PR opens immediately with no checks
The repo is force-pushed to main
questions.question_zh: 在 agent 循环结束、开 PR 之前发生什么 gating?
options_zh: reviewer 模型重写 diff
在 sandbox 内跑完整 CI,计算覆盖率差异,超过阈值的 PR 被打上 needs-review 标签
PR 立即打开,无任何检查
仓库被 force-push 到 main

questions.question: Which budget knobs does the dispatcher enforce per repo per day?
options: Only a wall-clock cap
Unlimited PRs and unlimited cost
A dollar ceiling per PR plus a maximum number of PRs per repo per day
Only a turn cap
questions.question_zh: 派发器对每个仓库每天强制的预算控制项是?
options_zh: 仅 wall-clock 上限
PR 数无限,成本无限
每个 PR 的美元上限,加上每仓库每天的 PR 数上限
仅 turn 上限

questions.question: What goes into the PR body that the agent posts?
options: Only the diff
Rationale, diff summary, trace URL, cost, and turn count so reviewers can audit and follow up
A generated changelog only
Nothing; the PR has an empty body
questions.question_zh: agent 发布的 PR 正文里包含什么?
options_zh: 只有 diff
理由、diff 摘要、trace URL、成本和 turn 数,方便 reviewer 审计与跟进
只生成的 changelog
什么都没有,PR 正文为空
